userStories.title: Move agents page to standalone route and fix layout nav
userStories.description: Delete `pages/[project]/agents.vue` and create `pages/agents.vue` that fetches from `GET /agents` (no project slug). Fix `changeStatus` to call `PATCH /agents/:slug`. Update `layouts/default.vue` to remove the project-scoped Agents nav link and add a global `/agents` link (Bot icon) in the always-visible section alongside Dashboard. Add the `/agents` breadcrumb case to `breadcrumbItems`. Add required i18n keys to both locale files.
acceptanceCriteria: When `pages/agents.vue` is loaded, `useAsyncData` is called with key `'agents'` and fetches `$api.get('/agents')`
When `changeStatus(agent, newStatus)` is called, it calls `$api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug, { status: newStatus })`
Given `route.path === '/agents'`, `breadcrumbItems` returns `[{ label: 'Koda', to: '/' }, { label: t('nav.agents') }]`
When the sidebar renders without a project context, the `/agents` NuxtLink with Bot icon is visible
When the sidebar renders with a project context (`projectSlug` is set), the old `/${projectSlug}/agents` NuxtLink is not present

userStories.title: CreateAgentDialog with API key reveal
userStories.description: Create `components/CreateAgentDialog.vue` using vee-validate + toTypedSchema + zod. Fields: name (required), slug (auto-derived kebab-case from name, user-editable, pattern `/^[a-z0-9-]+$/`), roles (checkboxes VERIFIER/DEVELOPER/REVIEWER, min 1), capabilities (tag input, optional), maxConcurrentTickets (integer ≥ 1, default 3). On success the dialog switches to a key-reveal view: read-only Input with the `apiKey`, Copy button (clipboard + 2s 'Copied!' feedback), warning message 'Copy this API key now. It will not be shown again.', and a Done button that emits `'created'` and closes. Wire a 'Create Agent' button in `pages/agents.vue` PageHeader that opens this dialog; call `refresh()` on `'created'`.
acceptanceCriteria: When the `name` field value changes, `slug` is auto-derived as kebab-case but remains independently editable by the user
When the form is submitted with valid values, it calls `$api.post('/agents', { name, slug, roles, capabilities, maxConcurrentTickets })`
When the API call succeeds, the dialog renders a read-only Input containing the returned `apiKey` value
When the Copy button is clicked, the `apiKey` is written to the clipboard and the button label changes to 'Copied!' for 2 seconds then reverts
When the form is submitted with `roles` empty, a validation error is shown and `$api.post` is not called
When the Done button is clicked on the key-reveal view, the dialog emits `'created'` and closes
When `pages/agents.vue` receives the `'created'` event from `CreateAgentDialog`, it calls `refresh()`
Given `maxConcurrentTickets` is not provided by the user, the form defaults to `3`

userStories.title: CreateAgentDialog form with vee-validate + zod validation
userStories.description: Create CreateAgentDialog.vue component with vee-validate + toTypedSchema + zod. Implement form fields: name (required), slug (user-editable, pattern /^[a-z0-9-]+$/), roles (checkboxes VERIFIER/DEVELOPER/REVIEWER, min 1 required), capabilities (tag input, optional), maxConcurrentTickets (integer ≥ 1, default 3). Include validation errors displayed for each field.
acceptanceCriteria: CreateAgentDialog.vue uses vee-validate with toTypedSchema(z.object) for form validation
name field is required
slug field validates against pattern /^[a-z0-9-]+$/
roles field requires at least one checkbox selected (VERIFIER, DEVELOPER, REVIEWER)
capabilities is an optional tag input field
maxConcurrentTickets defaults to 3, validates integer ≥ 1
Validation errors are shown inline for each field on submission attempt

routing.reasoning: Standard Vue form component with multiple validation rules - single file, known libraries, no new subsystems

userStories.title: Slug auto-derivation from name field
userStories.description: Implement reactive slug auto-derivation: when name field changes, slug is automatically computed as kebab-case (lowercase, spaces replaced with hyphens). The slug field remains independently editable after auto-derivation.
acceptanceCriteria: When name field value changes, slug is auto-derived as kebab-case
Auto-derivation triggers on every name change (debounced or immediate)
User can manually edit the slug after auto-derivation
Edited slug is preserved unless name changes again

routing.reasoning: Form reactivity with debounce, manual edit preservation, and state management is a standard feature with moderate logic, not a trivial edit

userStories.title: Key-reveal view with Copy button
userStories.description: Implement the key-reveal success view in CreateAgentDialog. After API success, display a read-only Input containing the returned apiKey, a Copy button that writes to clipboard and shows 'Copied!' for 2 seconds, warning message 'Copy this API key now. It will not be shown again.', and a Done button.
acceptanceCriteria: On API success, dialog switches from form to key-reveal view
Read-only Input displays the returned apiKey value
Copy button writes apiKey to clipboard
Copy button label changes to 'Copied!' for 2 seconds then reverts to 'Copy'
Warning message 'Copy this API key now. It will not be shown again.' is displayed
Done button emits 'created' event and closes the dialog
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: balanced: Rectification exhausted after 2 attempts (3 test failures)

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier balanced, escalating to next tier

routing.reasoning: Adding a new view state to existing dialog with clipboard functionality and timeout state - standard UI work, no new subsystems or complex integrations.

userStories.title: Create Agent button and refresh integration
userStories.description: Wire a 'Create Agent' button in pages/agents.vue PageHeader that opens CreateAgentDialog. Handle 'created' event emitted from dialog to call refresh().
acceptanceCriteria: 'Create Agent' button exists in agents.vue PageHeader
Clicking the button opens CreateAgentDialog
When dialog emits 'created' event, refresh() is called
Dialog closes after 'created' event is emitted

routing.reasoning: Straightforward UI wiring: adding a button, opening a dialog, and handling a refresh event - no new logic or subsystems

userStories.title: API submission wiring
userStories.description: Wire form submission to API call. On valid form submission, call $api.post('/agents', { name, slug, roles, capabilities, maxConcurrentTickets }). On API failure, show error state. On success, switch to key-reveal view with returned apiKey.
acceptanceCriteria: On valid form submission, calls $api.post('/agents', { name, slug, roles, capabilities, maxConcurrentTickets })
On API failure, error message is displayed and dialog remains in form view
On API success, dialog switches to key-reveal view with returned apiKey
On empty roles validation failure, $api.post is NOT called

routing.reasoning: Standard form-to-API wiring with validation, error/success state handling, and view switching - straightforward but involves multiple logic branches

userStories.title: EditAgentRolesDialog and EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog
userStories.description: Create `components/EditAgentRolesDialog.vue`: receives `agent` prop, pre-checks current roles as checkboxes (VERIFIER/DEVELOPER/REVIEWER), submits `PATCH /agents/:slug/update-roles`, shows success toast, emits `'updated'`. Create `components/EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog.vue`: receives `agent` prop, renders current capabilities as removable Badge tags, Enter in Input appends a new tag, submits `PATCH /agents/:slug/update-capabilities`, shows success toast, emits `'updated'`. Wire both into the actions dropdown per agent row in `pages/agents.vue`; call `refresh()` on `'updated'`.
acceptanceCriteria: When `EditAgentRolesDialog` opens with an agent, the checkboxes for the agent's current roles are pre-checked
When `EditAgentRolesDialog` is submitted, it calls `$api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/update-roles', { roles })`
When `EditAgentRolesDialog` submission succeeds, it shows a success toast and emits `'updated'`
When `EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog` opens with an agent, existing capabilities are rendered as removable Badge tags
When the user presses Enter in the `EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog` input, the entered text is appended as a new capability tag
When a capability Badge's remove control is clicked in `EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog`, that tag is removed from the list
When `EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog` is submitted, it calls `$api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/update-capabilities', { capabilities })`
When `EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog` submission succeeds, it shows a success toast and emits `'updated'`
When `pages/agents.vue` receives `'updated'` from either edit dialog, it calls `refresh()`
When the actions dropdown is opened for an agent row, it contains 'Edit Roles' and 'Edit Capabilities' items

userStories.title: RotateKeyDialog and DeleteAgentDialog
userStories.description: Create `components/RotateKeyDialog.vue`: shows confirm message, on confirm calls `POST /agents/:slug/rotate-key`, on success switches to key-reveal view (same Copy + warning pattern as CreateAgentDialog), Done emits `'rotated'`. Create `components/DeleteAgentDialog.vue`: shows confirm message containing the agent's name, on confirm calls `DELETE /agents/:slug`, on success shows toast, emits `'deleted'`, closes. Wire both into the actions dropdown per agent row in `pages/agents.vue`; call `refresh()` on both events.
acceptanceCriteria: When `RotateKeyDialog` confirm button is clicked, it calls `$api.post('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/rotate-key', {})`
When `RotateKeyDialog` rotation succeeds, the dialog switches to a key-reveal view showing the new `apiKey` in a read-only Input with Copy button and warning message
When the Copy button in `RotateKeyDialog` is clicked, the new `apiKey` is written to the clipboard and the button label shows 'Copied!' for 2 seconds
When `RotateKeyDialog` Done button is clicked, it emits `'rotated'` and closes the dialog
When `DeleteAgentDialog` opens, the confirm message contains the agent's `name`
When `DeleteAgentDialog` confirm button is clicked, it calls `$api.delete('/agents/' + agent.slug)`
When `DeleteAgentDialog` deletion succeeds, it shows a success toast, emits `'deleted'`, and closes
When `pages/agents.vue` receives `'rotated'` from `RotateKeyDialog`, it calls `refresh()`
When `pages/agents.vue` receives `'deleted'` from `DeleteAgentDialog`, it calls `refresh()`
When the actions dropdown is opened for an agent row, it contains 'Rotate Key' and 'Delete' items

analysis:
The existing agents page lives at `apps/web/pages/[project]/agents.vue` and calls `GET /projects/${slug}/agents` which does not exist in the API — causing a 404. The correct endpoint is `GET /agents` (system-level, not project-scoped). The Agents nav link is hidden inside a `v-if="projectSlug"` block in `layouts/default.vue`, making it invisible from the dashboard. All CRUD endpoints (`POST /agents`, `PATCH /agents/:slug/update-roles`, `PATCH /agents/:slug/update-capabilities`, `POST /agents/:slug/rotate-key`, `DELETE /agents/:slug`) exist in the API but are unused in the web UI.

Key files to modify:
- `apps/web/pages/[project]/agents.vue` → DELETE and replace with `apps/web/pages/agents.vue`
- `apps/web/layouts/default.vue` → remove project-scoped agents link, add global `/agents` link, add breadcrumb case
- `apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json` → add agents CRUD i18n keys
- `apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json` → add agents CRUD i18n keys (Chinese)

Key files to create:
- `apps/web/components/CreateAgentDialog.vue` — vee-validate + toTypedSchema + zod, API key reveal on success
- `apps/web/components/EditAgentRolesDialog.vue` — checkbox modal for roles
- `apps/web/components/EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog.vue` — tag-input modal
- `apps/web/components/RotateKeyDialog.vue` — confirm + key-reveal
- `apps/web/components/DeleteAgentDialog.vue` — confirm + delete

Patterns to follow:
- Form dialogs: `CreateProjectDialog.vue` uses vee-validate + `toTypedSchema` + zod, `useForm`, `handleSubmit`, `watch` for slug auto-derive
- API calls: `useApi()` exposes `$api.get`, `$api.post`, `$api.patch`, `$api.delete`; errors caught with `extractApiError`
- Toasts: `useAppToast()` returns `toast.success()` / `toast.error()`
- Shadcn-nuxt components available: Dialog, Input, Button, Badge, Table*, FormField/Item/Control/Label/Message, DropdownMenu*, Checkbox (check if available), Separator
- The `Agent` interface needs `maxConcurrentTickets: number` added vs the current page which omits it
- `useAsyncData` key must be a stable string without project slug for the top-level page
- Breadcrumb: `layouts/default.vue` `breadcrumbItems` is a computed that checks `route.path`; add `/agents` case before the fallback
- i18n: `nav.agents` key already exists; new keys go under `agents.*` namespace
- Web stack is Nuxt 3 (not Next.js); components use `<script setup lang="ts">` + `<template>` SFC pattern

Risks:
- Deleting `pages/[project]/agents.vue` removes the project-scoped route `/[project]/agents` — any existing links to it in other pages must be cleaned up (currently only `layouts/default.vue` links to it)
- The old `useAsyncData` key `agents-${slug}` must become `'agents'` — a mismatch would cause SSR hydration issues
- `$api.delete` is named `delete_` internally but exposed as `delete` on the returned object — use `$api.delete` in templates
